Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration Of Order Sustaining Demurrer Without Leave To Amend
Off Calendar Jun-02-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFFS RODOLFO VERGARA and ESTRELLA VERGARA'S Motion For Reconsideration Of Order Sustaining Demurrer Without Leave To Amend, Or In The Alternative, For Relief From Order Under CCP Section 473(b).
APPEARANCE: Salvador Lopez, 863-6214 deft & opposing party inpropria persona; no other appearances.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling: DENIED - TREATED AS CCP SECTION 473(b) DISCRETIONARY MOTION AND IS GRANTED. 5 DAYS TO ANSWER. COURT TO PREPARE ORDER. (301/JLW/EH) Court Reporter Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-20-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Salvador Lopez, 415-863-6214, defendant and moving party in propria persona.
Nicolas Gomez, Jr., Esq., 650-635-4580 for plaintiff and opposing party Rodolfo Vergara.

RULING:
A R G U E D; the Court adopted its Tentative Ruling:
DEFENDANT SALVADOR LOPEZ's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend. No opposition filed. Plaintiff's counsel asked for relief for untimely opposition. The court denied this relief due to defendants objections. Prevailing party to submit form of order.(301/JLW) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR: 1558

Mtn To Strike Complt

DEFENDANT SALVADOR LOPEZ's Motion To Strike Complaint is off calendar. First amended complaint filed on 3/18/05. (301/DM) Reporter: Rhonda Fung, CSR: 4819
